summary: Completed all steps. Created geometry_error_handling.rs test file with FailingMockGeometryKernel and FailingExportMockGeometryKernel. Fixed Engine::build() to count total_ops and skip export when last_handle.is_none() && total_ops > 0, pushing a summary diagnostic instead. All 4 new tests pass (kernel failure, compile failure, export skip verification, no-realizations regression). All 140 tests across the crate pass with zero regressions.

Wrote consecutive_edit_param_only_reevaluates_affected_nodes test in incremental.rs. Test verifies: cold-start eval (volume=4e-5), first edit width→0.1 (volume=5e-5, eval_set={volume,C1}), second edit height→0.12 (volume=6e-5, eval_set={volume} only — C1 excluded proving no residual dirty state), snapshot provenance chain (ID=2, parent=1, changed={height}), all-Final freshness postcondition, pending_transition_count. Test passed immediately — no implementation changes needed. All 141 tests pass, zero regressions.

Fixed assertion_scope_mismatch per review feedback. Replaced fragile pending_transition_count assertion that derived expected count from last_eval_set() (post-cutoff actual_eval_set) with direct assertion against known constant 1, plus detailed comment explaining the semantic mismatch between pending_transition_count (full eval_set scope) and last_eval_set() (actual_eval_set scope). All 138 tests pass, zero regressions. All plan steps now complete.

Completed all 26 steps + 1 prerequisite for task 20 (ResolutionNode in evaluation graph). Added: ResolutionNodeData struct with id/scope/auto_params/constraint_deps/content_hash; resolutions PersistentMap on EvaluationGraph; NodeId::Resolution variant with From impl; CachedResult::Resolution(HashMap<ValueCellId, Value>) with tag [23] content hash; Resolution iteration in build_from_graph and build_trace_map; Resolution arm in demand cone rebuild_cone; resolution hash in topology_fingerprint. 12 new tests, all 108 reify-eval tests pass, full workspace (330+ tests) passes with zero regressions.

Completed ALL 16 steps + 1 prerequisite for the auto keyword task (task 18). Grammar: added auto_keyword rule to tree-sitter grammar and regenerated parser. Parser: added ExprKind::Auto variant and auto_keyword handling in lower_param. Compiler: added ValueCellKind::Auto and compile-time detection of ExprKind::Auto in param defaults. Test support: added auto_param() builder method. Eval: updated Snapshot::from_compiled_module to initialize Auto cells as (Undef, DeterminacyState::Auto), added Auto handling in Engine::eval() and Engine::eval_cached() with version fast-path, cache reuse, and param_overrides support. Constraints naturally return Indeterminate for auto params via Undef propagation. All workspace tests pass with zero regressions.

Completed ALL 20 steps + 2 prerequisites for task 21 (Resolution engine — wire solver into eval pipeline). Added: MockConstraintSolver with 3 constructors (new_solved, new_infeasible, new_no_progress) and ConstraintSolver trait impl. Added resolved_params field to EvalResult/CheckResult/BuildResult. Added solver: Option<Box<dyn ConstraintSolver>> to Engine with with_solver() builder. Implemented resolution phase in eval(): scans templates for Auto params, builds ResolutionProblem, calls solver, handles Solved (updates values, snapshot, cache, provenance, re-evaluates lets), Infeasible (extends diagnostics), NoProgress (warning). Propagates resolved_params through check() and build(). 10 new resolution tests, all reify-eval tests (164+) pass with zero regressions.
